HPM.Tab.Label: Group Resources
HPM.DeleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete the resource "{name}"?
HPM.HeroPointReplacement.Label: Use as Hero Point replacement
HPM.HeroPointReplacement.Hint: Replaces the individual hero points with this shared group resource.
HPM.PoolTooltip: Shared hero point pool: {name} (left click +1 / right click −1)
HPM.NoPermission: You lack permission to change the group pool. Owner permission on the party actor is required.
HPM.FreeHeroPoint.Label: free
HPM.FreeHeroPoint.Hint: Free hero point – automatically marked as used when spent (one-time). Toggleable with owner permission on the party actor.
